_note: Canon drift gate map (v1). Consumed by canon/checkCanon.js (all axes) AND fellboard.html (the `concepts` block, to auto-fill Add Work file lists). In-file blocks are delimited by /* CANON:<concept> start */ ... /* CANON:<concept> end */ sentinels. Whole-file members are matched by path. A few blocks use explicit anchorStart/anchorEnd substrings. Each concept-bearing file is policed by EXACTLY ONE axis. Axis 3 (co-change) reads the `concepts` block below (formerly a flat `manual` array). See CANON_SOURCES.md for the source-of-truth backlog and known limitations.

mirror._note: Axis 2: every embeds/<name>.html must be byte-identical to docs/<name>.html. Concept-independent structural rule.

generated._note: Axis 1: re-run the generator. If its committed output differs, the source changed without a rebuild (or the output was hand-edited). genCanon is intentionally EXCLUDED in v1 (it errors on 3 targets and would regress aspect categories - see CANON_SOURCES.md). Only the build.js rules pipeline is gated here.

concepts._note: Authoritative concept -> file membership. Single source of truth consumed by BOTH canon/checkCanon.js (axis 3, which reads ONLY the .forge list) and fellboard.html (auto-fills Add Work file lists), so the board and the gate can never disagree about what a concept contains. Replaces the former flat `manual` array; each concept's .forge is a 1:1 lift of the old .members (same {file, tag} / {file, anchorStart, anchorEnd} / whole-file shapes the gate needs). .vault lists vault-repo (lorefell-fellguide) files for the paired vault half; it is NEVER read by the gate, so vault paths absent from the forge checkout cannot fail forge CI. A .vault entry is either an explicit path or a glob the board expands against the vault repo (e.g. "_Canon/collections/Afflictions/*.md"). Empty .vault means the board flags the vault half as manual-entry. Embeds twins (embeds/<name>.html) are implied by the `mirror` rule and intentionally NOT listed. `label` is the board's dropdown text.

skills.label: Skills
skills.recommendedSource: undecided - vault _Canon/CANON.md 24-skill table (needs a collection doc)

conditions.label: Afflictions & conditions
conditions._note: Uses existing markers (no CANON sentinel added). Other affliction copies exist in docs/sigilforge.html, docs/brandforge.html (const AFFLICTIONS), and the foe packs. Those are tracked in CANON_SOURCES.md, not yet gated here.

dead._note: Read by nothing in either repo (only CHANGELOG history). Look canonical by name. They are not. Delete or clearly mark - see CANON_SOURCES.md.

deferred_v2.worlds: Hardcoded across threadspire/fatewell/bondforge/sagaforge/fellforge/the_cartographer. Sibling set not yet pinned.
deferred_v2.wixSeedParity: Axis 4: cross-check seed values vs inline copies. Too brittle until consolidation reduces shape mismatches.
deferred_v2.genCanonStaleness: Re-enable axis-1 regen-diff for genCanon once its 3 broken regex anchors and ASPECT_META (Redoubt/Kindle) are fixed.
deferred_v2.vaultSeedStaleness: Axis 1 cannot verify vault -> seed in forge CI (vault is a separate private repo). See CANON_SOURCES.md v2 item #1.
